name: Zenless Zone Zero RPG (ZZZ)
description:
Survive in the world of Zenless Zone Zero (all factions included from V2.7 and below.)


UPDATE (20th of April 2026): Added Cissia, Severian, Norma (likely subject to change), Velina (likely subject to change), and Promeia.


ACTUAL token count including lorebooks: somewhere between 30000 - 35000 tokens


FYI if you dont know how a lorebook works (from my understanding): basically, it's just a thing that bot creators can apply to bots to give it the same amount of information but without using nearly as many tokens. It works by giving the bot access to certain information when certain trigger words are spoken during the chat. In this case, the trigger words are the agent names or their faction names (for example: if "miyabi" is said during the chat, the bot will be given all the info i've given it about miyabi).

proxy recommended.
